item.title: A lick from my course вҖқ20 Trainbeat Twang Licks вҖқ with @jtc_...
item.description:
View on Instagram


A lick from my course вҖқ20 Trainbeat Twang Licks вҖқ with @jtc_guitarрҹӨ  Check it out!рҹҢөTABs and lessons are available on my вһЎпёҸ PatreonрҹӨ рҹҡӮ $5/month to get access to all of my lessons, solos, etudes, licks, backing tracks and much more! (LINK IN BIO)вҖўвҖўвҖў#guitar #guitarist #telecaster #guitarsolo #guitarlicks#doublestops #country #countryguitar #chickenpicking
